description: Renesas ForgeFPGA — small, low-power FPGA family with 5-input LUTs, DFFs, PLL, OTP-based configuration and SPI boot. Format: SLG47{model}{package_code}. Example: SLG47910V.

fields.label: Prefix
fields.description: Renesas ForgeFPGA vendor prefix (legacy Silego/Dialog "SLG" prefix retained for the 47xxx ForgeFPGA series).

fields.label: Model
fields.description: ForgeFPGA device model — selects logic capacity and GPIO count.

options.label: SLG47910
options.description: 1120 5-bit LUTs / 1120 DFFs, 16 kb BRAM, 384 kb OTP. Up to 19 GPIO (STQFN-24) or 16 GPIO (WLCSP-20).

options.label: SLG47912
options.description: 1120 5-bit LUTs / 1120 DFFs, 16 kb BRAM, 384 kb OTP. 48-pin package with 40 GPIO.

options.label: SLG47920
options.description: 2240 5-bit LUTs / 2240 DFFs. 40-pin LQFN with 32 GPIO (no WLCSP option).

fields.label: Package
fields.description: Package-type suffix. All production parts are industrial temperature range (-40 °C to +85 °C).

options.label: V (STQFN / LQFN)
options.description: Plastic QFN-style package: STQFN-24 (3.0 x 3.0 mm, 0.4 P) on SLG47910; LQFN-40 (5.0 x 5.0 mm, 0.4 P) on SLG47920; LQFN-48 (6.0 x 6.0 mm, 0.4 P) on SLG47912 / SLG47921.

options.label: C (WLCSP)
options.description: Wafer-level chip-scale package: 20-ball (1.85 x 1.64 mm, 0.35 P) on SLG47910; 48-ball (3.24 x 2.57 mm, 0.35 P) on SLG47912 / SLG47921. Not offered on SLG47920.
